powerbi-modeling._comment: Power BI Modeling MCP - Uses interactive Azure AD auth by default. For service principal auth, set AZURE_CLIENT_ID, AZURE_TENANT_ID, and AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET env vars.

powerbi-remote._comment: Remote Power BI MCP Server (Preview). Requires tenant admin to enable 'Users can use the Power BI MCP server endpoint'. Users need Build permissions on semantic models. A Copilot license is required for generate_query tool.

powerplatform-pac._comment: Power Platform MCP via PAC CLI. Authenticated as Dylan.Mordaunt@health.nsw.gov.au (Illawarra Shoalhaven LHD).

powerplatform-pacx._comment: Greg.Xrm.Command (PACX) - Enhanced Dataverse CLI. Authentication pending - run 'pacx auth' to setup.
